project_context.core_vibe: Duolingo meets Fortnite in a cyberpunk neon setting

typography.instructions: Avoid generic fonts like Inter or Roboto. Use expressive, gaming-inspired typography to match the arcade aesthetic.

colors.strategy: Deep Obsidian background with Electric/Neon accents. DO NOT use generic Vercel/Stripe gradients or AI-slop purple. Colors must serve as gamified feedback (XP, Level Up, Urgent).

surface_strategies.cards: Solid backgrounds (#1A1A1E) with sharp 2px borders (border-white/10). Active/Quest cards should have vibrant colored borders (border-[#FFB800]). NO glassmorphism—keep it solid and tactile.
surface_strategies.buttons: The 'Tactile Arcade' look. Buttons must have a deep bottom border (`border-b-4`) that compresses on active state (`active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-1`) to feel like pressing a physical arcade button.
surface_strategies.panels: Bottom sheet modals with large drag handles and rounded top corners (`rounded-t-3xl`).

grids_and_layouts.mobile_first_rules: Always design for max-w-md mx-auto for desktop viewing, ensuring it looks like a mobile app frame. Use safe-area paddings.
grids_and_layouts.navigation: Sticky bottom navigation bar. Use heavy iconography and hide labels on inactive tabs to keep it clean.
grids_and_layouts.bento_boxes: Use tight grids for stats (grid-cols-2 gap-3). Elements should stretch to fill exactly. Use heavy padding (p-4 to p-6) inside containers.

component_guidelines.progress_bars: Must be thick (h-4 or h-6), fully rounded (`rounded-full`), and feature an inner shadow. Use animated stripes (via CSS linear-gradient background) to simulate 'charging' or XP gain.
component_guidelines.badges: Pill-shaped (`rounded-full`), highly saturated background with dark text for contrast.
component_guidelines.avatars: Chunky borders around avatars (`border-2 border-[#FFB800] p-1`).
component_guidelines.daily_quests: List items should look like 'tickets' or 'bounties'. Display the reward (e.g., '+50 XP') prominently in electric green.
component_guidelines.customization: Heavily override Shadcn UI default styles. Remove 'ring-offset-background' default aesthetics. Make inputs and selects chunky with `h-14` and `rounded-xl`.

motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: All tap targets must have an `active:scale-95` and `transition-transform` rule.
motion_and_interactions.success_states: MANDATORY: Trigger `canvas-confetti` explosion when a daily task is completed or a prize is purchased.
motion_and_interactions.loading: No generic spinners. Use a bouncing dot or a pulse effect on an arcade icon.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide-in from right for new pages, mimicking native iOS/Android navigation.

visual_enhancers.icons: Use `lucide-react` but set `strokeWidth={2.5}` or `3` to make them look thick and playful.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use Tailwind's `drop-shadow` for neon elements, e.g., `drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,184,0,0.8)]`.

media_and_images.strategy: Use high-quality product images for the Prize Store. Apply a subtle dark gradient overlay at the bottom of prize cards to ensure text readability.

prizes.description: Neon gift box glowing at night
Elegant gift boxes wrapped in black ribbons

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on primary yellow/orange buttons is Obsidian (#0A0A0A) for strict WCAG contrast compliance. Do not use white text on yellow.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum touch target size must be 48x48px (Tailwind `w-12 h-12`).
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="redeem-prize-button"`).
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap confetti and heavy animations in `motion-safe` variants.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the font imports (Unbounded and Nunito) into the main CSS/HTML head.
Implement the 'Arcade Button' pattern: thick bottom borders that shrink on click.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for the sticky bottom nav; it must be solid surface color with a top border to prevent content bleed.
Use canvas-confetti library. Trigger it from a React effect or button click handler on the 'Щоденні завдання' (Daily Quests) page.
Ensure the UI text is entirely in Ukrainian as requested.
Design the MVP with 4 main views: Login, Home (Profile + Stats), Quests, and Prize Store.
Since this is mobile-first, constrain the main app container layout to max-width: 480px, centered on desktop, taking full width on mobile.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Do not use default centered layouts, simplistic gradients, or uniform soft shadows.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but prefer solid layers and thick strokes for this arcade theme over soft blurs.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements like transform, colors.
You MUST NOT center align the app container text natively.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯) for icons. Use lucide-react.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui, but heavily customize their Tailwind classes to match the arcade/neobrutalist style.
